title: cystopteris fragilis
intro: Cystopteris fragilis, also known as fragile fern or lace fern, is a delicate and rare species of fern that belongs to the family Cystopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
